---
name: Pull Request
about: Ajukan pull request untuk kontribusi code
title: "[PR] Deskripsi singkat perubahan"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## 📋 Deskripsi

Jelaskan perubahan yang Anda buat dan kenapa.

## 🔗 Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number) atau Related to #(issue number)

## 🎨 Tipe Perubahan

- [ ] Bug fix (perubahan yang fix issue tanpa breaking changes)
- [ ] Feature baru (perubahan yang add functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix atau feature yang change existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## ✅ Testing

Jelaskan testing yang sudah dilakukan:

- [ ] Tested pada Linux Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
- [ ] Tested pada Fedora / RHEL
- [ ] Tested pada Arch Linux
- [ ] Tested pada Termux / Android
- [ ] Tested pada Windows WSL2
- [ ] Monitor mode verified
- [ ] Error handling checked
- [ ] No new warnings generated

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code comments added untuk complex logic
- [ ] README updated (jika perlu)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

## 🔒 Security

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] No breaking security practices

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] Code mengikuti project style guide
- [ ] Self-review dari kode sudah dilakukan
- [ ] Komentar ditambahkan untuk complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tidak ada warning/error baru
- [ ] Testing lokal passed
- [ ] Related issues linked
- [ ] Squashed / organized commits

## 🎯 Screenshots

Jika ada UI changes, tambahin screenshots:

```
[Paste screenshots di sini]
```

## 📝 Additional Notes

Informasi tambahan untuk reviewer.

---

## Review Checklist (untuk Maintainer)

- [ ] Code quality baik
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation clear
- [ ] No security issues
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Backward compatible (atau documented breaking change)
